question: [File: 'File Name: common/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/common/domain/transaction/Transaction.java -> Scope: Medium: Increasing network processing node resource consumption by at least 30% without brute force actions, compared to the preceding 24 hours'] [Function: addItemizedTransfer()] Can an unprivileged external user submit CryptoTransfer transactions where the itemizedTransfer list is null initially and addItemizedTransfer() must allocate a new ArrayList on the first call, and by submitting many such transactions cause repeated ArrayList instantiation and growth (with potential array copy on resize) that increases heap allocation pressure and GC frequency in the mirror node JVM?
